title: Composable query builder with dynamic base
prompt: Write a reusable query module `MyApp.Accounts.UserQueries` that exposes a `base/1` function accepting options. If `scoped_to_team: team_id` is passed, base query is filtered to that team. Otherwise, base is all users. Then define composable `active/1` and `verified/1` builders that pipe from `base/1`. Also write `MyApp.Accounts.list_active_team_members/1` that uses these. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts/user_queries.ex` and `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Requires a base that varies by options + downstream composers that work over either base. Novel composition.
